name: Mind the Gaps
description: Scans your library for gaps (missing movies in partially-owned collections and franchises, missing series content, and unowned titles from actor and director filmographies) using TMDB, TheTVDB, and TVmaze. Presents an easy todo list for filling out your collection, surfaces where to watch each item, and can optionally mint native virtual placeholders for missing collection movies.
overview: Find what's missing and related in your library and build a todo list to complete it.

versions.changelog: 10.11.2.0 - The first public release since 10.11.1.0, rolling up the 10.11.1.x betas. The headline is Diagnose: a per-gap popup explains why something is reported missing, laying the gap and the owned items that look like it side by side and leading with a plain verdict (owned under the wrong id, an owned item already holds this id, stale, a wrong kind of id, or genuinely missing); a "Deeper analysis" button confirms against the source provider, and a library-wide identification audit runs the same check and downloads as Markdown. Diagnosis weighs both title and year, so a remake that shares a name with something you own (the 1960 Ocean's Eleven against the 2001 remake) is no longer reported as that title under the wrong id. Curated studio and keyword sets are now chosen with a type-ahead chip picker (search TheMovieDb, pick a match, it becomes a removable chip), keyboard and screen-reader accessible, and the Set completion tab groups by kind of set (collections and franchises, studios, keywords, series, and discographies). The Markdown exports gained structure: grouped sections, a table of contents, and native collapsible blocks (closed by default) for a large export. Also: a JustWatch search button on rows that lack a JustWatch link; titles that begin with "The" file under both T and the next word's letter; provider overviews are stripped of stray HTML and episode and season rows gained their search and open icons; a fresh install opens to settings until the first scan; and the settings panel warns about unsaved changes. Breaking change: the old free-text studio-names field was removed in favor of the chip picker, so any studios configured by name (rather than id) are dropped and must be re-picked.

10.11.1.0 - Initial release. Mind the Gaps scans your library and builds a dashboard todo list of what is missing or worth adding: movies missing from a collection or franchise; missing seasons and episodes (optionally cross-checked against TVmaze and TheTVDB); films from an owned actor or director's filmography (with an independent Trakt cross-check); curated studio and keyword sets; and TMDB recommendations. Experimental music and books sources are included too. It shows where to watch each gap, links out to TMDB, IMDb, TheTVDB, and JustWatch, and can optionally mint reversible virtual placeholders for missing collection movies.
